zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Somes於大約1540年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾哈德亞德時，他的父親Steven Somes24歲，母親Mrs Steven Somes22歲。他於1559年10月30日與Alice Glouer在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾其勒結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾其勒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Somes于大约1540年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾哈德亞德时，他的父亲Steven Somes24岁，母亲Mrs Steven Somes22岁。他于1559年10月30日与Alice Glouer在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾其勒结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾其勒。

nameMeanings.name: Somes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name, with post-medieval excrescent -s, from Saham Toney (Norfolk), Earl and Monk Soham (Suffolk), or Soham (Cambridgeshire), and perhaps also Siam Hall near Newton (Suffolk), all of which share the same etymology (‘lake estate’, Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + hām ‘village, homestead, estate’).

variants.name: Sones
meanings: perhaps an altered form of Soames; see Somes .

variant of Soane, with post-medieval excrescent -s (see Son ). The -o- in Middle English and early modern English son(e) is a conventional spelling of /u/ before an n. This /u/ became /ʌ/ in Standard English, hence the current pronunciation of Son. If /u/ was lengthened it became /o:/ in Middle English, and then /u:/ in modern English, hence the occasional spelling Soon. In some speakers' dialects, however, it seems that Middle English /u/ may have been lowered to /ɔ/ and lengthened to /ɔ:/, becoming modern English /əu/ represented in the spelling Soane. At any rate, Soon and Soane (also Sone) appear together in the same counties and are presumably alternative pronunciations of the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Somes was born about 1540, in Hardmead, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Steven Somes, was 24 and his mother, Mrs Steven Somes, was 22. He married Alice Glouer on 30 October 1559, in Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He was buried in Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Somes est né environ 1540, à Hardmead, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Steven Somes, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mrs Steven Somes, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Alice Glouer le 30 octobre 1559, à Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Ilenterré à Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Somes um 1540 in Hardmead, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Steven Somes 24 und seine Mutter Mrs Steven Somes 22. Er hat am 30. Oktober 1559 in Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Glouer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er wurde in Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Somes è nato il circa 1540 nel Hardmead, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Steven Somes, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Steven Somes, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Alice Glouer il 30 ottobre 1559, nel Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Fu sepolto a Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Somesが約1540年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハードメアドで生まれた時，父Steven Somesは24歳，母Mrs Steven Somesは22歳であった。1559年10月30日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチチェリーでAlice Glouerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチチェリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Somes(이)가 대략 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 하르드미드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Steven Somes(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Steven Somes(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1559년 10월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 치셸이에서 Alice Glouer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 치셸이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Somes nasceu aproximadamente 1540, em Hardmead, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Steven Somes, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Steven Somes, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Glouer em 30 de outubro de 1559, em Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele foi sepultado em Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Somes родился около 1540 г. в местности хардмид, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Steven Somes было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Steven Somes, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Glouer 30 октября 1559 г. в местности шичели, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он был похоронен в местности шичели, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Somes nació aproximadamente 1540, en Hardmead, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Steven Somes, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Mrs Steven Somes, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Alice Glouer el 30 de octubre de 1559, en Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Fue sepultado en Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
